notes: The year and semester selectors behaved like multi-select widgets; captured uiFormValues preserve this quirk for provenance.
2025 fall attempts still returned spring rows in the visible sample and remain unresolved supporting provenance rather than trusted fall snapshots.
ERP category labels are preserved as raw catalog labels only and must not be treated as graduation truth without bulletin-backed rule interpretation.

Exact course-code snapshots for the legacy in-scope course list are stored in erp-course-code-snapshots-2025-spring.json to preserve row-level ERP evidence, including zero-result attempts and 2026 co-selection quirks.
erp-row-evidence-map.json now grades each four-department spring prefix snapshot as supporting provenance and keeps the fall 2025 instability explicit for later interpretation work.
